attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS)

 minus
 select RELATIONSHIP_ID,DIRECTIONAL_FLAG,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.RELATIONSHIP_ID = STG_CG_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_ID and ACM.DIRECTIONAL_FLAG = STG_CG_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS.DIRECTIONAL_FLAG and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG_HZ_RELATIONSHIPS.REFRESH_DATETIME
